description: User hovers over the price per traveller filter slider at the start of the segment.
page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results | Expedia
frame_description: Expedia search results page for London hotels with filters on the left sidebar.

description: User hovers over the guest rating filter options, appearing to read the choices.
page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results | Expedia
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Guest rating' section of the filter sidebar.

description: User selects the 'Very good 8+' guest rating filter.
page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results | Expedia
frame_description: The user clicks the radio button for the 'Very good 8+' rating filter.

description: The page begins to refresh and update results after the filter selection.
page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results | Expedia
frame_description: The search results area begins to dim or show signs of updating.

description: The browser navigates to a new URL containing the guest rating filter parameter.
frame_description: The tab title briefly changes to a generic Expedia title during the navigation.

description: Loading skeleton screens and a spinner appear while the filtered results are fetched.
frame_description: The results area is replaced by grey skeleton placeholders and a blue loading spinner.

description: The new search results for hotels with a 'Very good 8+' rating are displayed.
frame_description: The skeleton screens disappear and the actual hotel cards for the filtered results render.

description: User scrolls down to view the updated list of hotels.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls down.

description: User hovers over the first hotel result card.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the hotel card for 'The Pelham London'.

description: User scrolls further down the results page.
frame_description: The user continues to scroll down through the hotel listings.

description: User hovers over the 'Breakfast included' filter checkbox.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'Popular filters' section and hovers over 'Breakfast included'.

description: User selects the 'Breakfast included' filter.
frame_description: The user clicks the checkbox for 'Breakfast included'.

description: The results list updates to reflect the breakfast filter.
frame_description: The results area flickers as it updates the list of hotels.

description: User scrolls down the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to see more results or filters.

description: User continues scrolling down.
frame_description: The user scrolls further down the page.

description: User scrolls back up towards the top of the page.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: User hovers over the guest rating filter section again.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the already selected 'Very good 8+' filter.

description: User scrolls up to the top of the sidebar.
frame_description: The user scrolls to the top of the filter sidebar.

description: User hovers over the price per traveller slider.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the price slider handles.

description: User drags the maximum price handle to the left to lower the price limit.
frame_description: The right handle of the price slider is moved left, and the maximum price value updates.

description: User drags the minimum price handle to the right to increase the lower price limit.
frame_description: The left handle of the price slider is moved right, and the minimum price value updates.

description: Results start updating based on the new price range.
frame_description: The results area begins to dim as the filter is applied.

description: Loading skeleton screens appear while results are filtered.
frame_description: Skeleton placeholders appear in the results area.

description: User adjusts the minimum price handle again while the page is loading.
frame_description: The user continues to tweak the price slider while the results are still loading.

description: Results update with the new price filter.
frame_description: The hotel cards reappear with the updated price filter applied.

description: User adjusts the maximum price handle further.
frame_description: The user drags the right handle of the price slider again.

description: Results update again based on the price adjustment.
frame_description: The results list refreshes to show hotels within the new price range.

description: User hovers over a hotel card in the updated results.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Lexham Gardens' hotel card.

description: User hovers over the 'Search by property name' input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the property name search box.

description: User scrolls down slightly.
frame_description: The user performs a small downward scroll.

description: User drags the minimum price handle further to the right.
frame_description: The user increases the minimum price limit on the slider.

description: Results update based on the increased minimum price.
frame_description: The results area refreshes.

description: User drags the maximum price handle significantly to the left, narrowing the price range.
frame_description: The user narrows the price range to a very small window on the slider.

description: Results start updating for the narrow price range.
frame_description: The results area begins to load new content.

description: Loading skeleton screens appear.
frame_description: Skeleton placeholders are visible while the narrow results load.

description: Final results for the narrow price range are displayed.
frame_description: The filtered hotel results are fully rendered.

description: User hovers over a hotel card in the final filtered list.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over 'The Drey' hotel card.

description: User scrolls down to browse the filtered results.
frame_description: The user scrolls through the final set of filtered hotel results.

description: User scrolls back up.
frame_description: The user scrolls back up to re-examine earlier results.

description: User hovers over 'The Z Hotel Victoria' card.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over 'The Z Hotel Victoria' card.

description: User hovers over 'Hub By Premier Inn London Westminster' card.
